name: SpecimenRole
title: Specimen Role (2.8.1 - 1.1.0)
description: HL7-defined code system of concepts that identify the role of a sample.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the Specimen (SPM) and Observation Request (OBR) segments.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: Calibrator, used for initial setting of calibration
concept.definition: Calibrator, used for initial setting of calibration

concept.display: Electronic QC, used with manufactured reference providing signals that simulate QC results
concept.definition: Electronic QC, used with manufactured reference providing signals that simulate QC results

concept.display: Specimen used for testing proficiency of the organization performing the testing (Filler)
concept.definition: Specimen used for testing proficiency of the organization performing the testing (Filler)

concept.display: Group (where a specimen consists of multiple individual elements that are not individually identified)
concept.definition: Group (where a specimen consists of multiple individual elements that are not individually identified)

concept.display: Pool (aliquots of individual specimens combined to form a single specimen representing all of the components.)
concept.definition: Pool (aliquots of individual specimens combined to form a single specimen representing all of the components.)

concept.display: Specimen used for testing Operator Proficiency
concept.definition: Specimen used for testing Operator Proficiency
Replicate (of patient sample as a control)
Verifying Calibrator, used for periodic calibration checks
